command:
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup && git pull origin main

echo "=== STORE PRE-9E1 BASELINE ==="
git stash 2>/dev/null; git stash drop 2>/dev/null

mkdir -p runtime
echo '# Moreno AI Runtime — Phase 9E.1+' > runtime/__init__.py

echo "" | base64 -d > runtime/agent_identity_loader.py
echo "Loader written: $(wc -l runtime/agent_identity_loader.py) lines"

echo ""
echo "=== SMOKE TEST ==="
python3 runtime/agent_identity_loader.py --repo . --list

echo ""
echo "=== --show sakura ==="
python3 runtime/agent_identity_loader.py --repo . --show sakura

echo ""
echo "=== --all ==="
python3 runtime/agent_identity_loader.py --repo . --all

echo ""
echo "=== --validate sentinel ==="
python3 runtime/agent_identity_loader.py --repo . --validate sentinel

echo ""
echo "=== AUDIT RECORDS WRITTEN ==="
ls -la /opt/docker/mcp-data/filesystem/audit/compliance/ | grep identity | head -10
